expectations.text: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
expectations.evidence: Does not reference ~/scripts/ecosystem.env. Suggests editing ~/.zshrc directly

expectations.text: Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_API_TOKEN or similar)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'NOTION_API_TOKEN' which matches the eval's acceptable range

expectations.text: Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
expectations.evidence: No separate env file sourcing. Edits ~/.zshrc directly

expectations.text: Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
expectations.evidence: No mention of any example file

eval_feedback.overall: Expected failure pattern without skill knowledge
